reasoning:
This animation sequence simulates the action of playfully holding and presenting a ribbon, emphasizing the light and graceful nature of the object.  The robot will use both arms, creating a delicate and inviting gesture.  The movements will be smooth, with a focus on creating a visually appealing arc. The robot’s lack of elbows will necessitate a focus on the shoulder joints (joint1 and joint2) to achieve the necessary movement.  Each frame will represent a distinct pose, conveying the progression of the gesture.

Frame 1: Both arms start in a relaxed position at the sides, slightly angled outward. This creates a welcoming, open posture. The wrists remain neutral.

Frame 2: The right arm extends upward and slightly outward, as if holding the ribbon at a slight angle. The left arm moves slightly outward and upward, creating a balanced and elegant gesture.  The wrists are slightly rotated to emphasize the ribbon's presentation.

Frame 3: The right arm lowers slightly, continuing the graceful arc of presenting the ribbon. The left arm moves to match, creating a more balanced presentation. The wrists slightly adjust to hold the ribbon in a more natural position.

Frame 4: Both arms return to a relaxed position by the sides, maintaining the gentle, inviting feel of the initial posture. The wrists are brought back to a neutral position, completing the movement.
